title: Open Cloze: The History of the Internet

tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.10) jednym slowem, tak aby powstal spojny i poprawny logicznie oraz gramatycznie tekst.
tasks.text:
Few inventions have changed the world as profoundly 1.1. _________ the Internet. What began as a small military communication network in the United States in the 1960s has grown into a global system 1.2. _________ connects billions of people and devices. The original network, known as ARPANET, was designed to allow computers to communicate with 1.3. _________ other even if part of the network was destroyed.

The Internet as we know it today took 1.4. _________ in 1991, when British scientist Tim Berners-Lee invented the World Wide Web — a system of interlinked documents accessible through a browser. This made the Internet far more 1.5. _________ to ordinary users, and its growth was explosive. By the early 2000s, the Internet had become a part of daily 1.6. _________ for hundreds of millions of people around the world.

Social 1.7. _________, streaming services, and online shopping have since transformed the way people communicate, entertain themselves, and buy goods. Today, the Internet handles enormous 1.8. _________ of data every second, from personal messages to financial transactions and live video streams.

However, this progress has also given 1.9. _________ to serious concerns about privacy, misinformation, and digital addiction. Ensuring that the Internet remains a safe and open 1.10. _________ for all users is one of the great challenges of the 21st century.
